metadata.title: VulnRadar EU — NIS2 Vulnerability Management
metadata.description: European platform for vulnerability management and NIS2 compliance for SMBs.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Status of your inventory and active alerts.

empty.noDevicesTitle: You haven't installed the agent yet
empty.noDevicesDescription: Download the agent, install it on a Windows machine, and you'll see alerts here as soon as the first scan completes (~2 min).
empty.noAlertsDescription: This could mean your device is up to date, or that the first scan hasn't completed yet.

error.title: Couldn't load the dashboard
error.description: There was a temporary issue loading your data. Try again in a few seconds.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the panel.
login.footer: Data processed in the EU · Frankfurt

errors.invalid: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
